generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism advisor, I've seen firsthand how our current security frameworks fall short. We need to empower our agencies to act decisively - the 2024 Boston incident proved that. While some worry about civil liberties, the real threat is inaction. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #NationalSecurityFirst
